zh.Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼
zh.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: 英國威爾斯安格萊波多爾根
zh.Newtown, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾紐托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion於大約1406年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊波多爾根時，他的父親Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan57歲，母親Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan53歲。他於大約1429年與Gwenllian Verch Maredudd在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼
zh-hans.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: 英国威尔斯安格萊波多爾根
zh-hans.Newtown, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾紐托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion于大约1406年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊波多爾根时，他的父亲Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan57岁，母亲Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan53岁。他于大约1429年与Gwenllian Verch Maredudd在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Abt  .

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Llwyd
meanings: Same as Lhuyd, q v.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion was born about 1406, in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan, was 57 and his mother, Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, was 53. He married Gwenllian Verch Maredudd about 1429, in Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion est né environ 1406, à Bodorgan, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian Verch Maredudd environ 1429, à Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion um 1406 in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan 57 und seine Mutter Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan 53. Er hat um 1429 in Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales Gwenllian Verch Maredudd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion è nato il circa 1406 nel Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian Verch Maredudd circa 1429, nel Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales: ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアコウニー
ja.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: イギリスウェールズアングレセイボドルガン
ja.Newtown, Montgomeryshire, Wales: ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアニュートウン
ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einionが約1406年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイボドルガンで生まれた時，父Leuan Fychan ap Ieuanは57歳，母Anne verch Gruffydd Fychanは53歳であった。約1429年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアコウニーでGwenllian Verch Mareduddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan(은)는 53세였다. 그는 대략 1429년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 코우니에서 Gwenllian Verch Maredudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

mg.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Angle's Eye, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion nasceu aproximadamente 1406, em Bodorgan, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Verch Maredudd aproximadamente 1429, em Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Anglesey, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion родился около 1406 г. в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Verch Maredudd около 1429 г. в местности коуни, монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.of Bodorgan,Llangadwaladr,Anglesey,Wales: Bodorgan, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion nació aproximadamente 1406, en Bodorgan, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Leuan Fychan ap Ieuan, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Anne verch Gruffydd Fychan, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Gwenllian Verch Maredudd aproximadamente 1429, en Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
